headlines.title: Trump says Iran called to make a deal after U.S. strikes; adds it's unclear if war is back on
headlines.summary: When asked whether the U.S. and Iran are returning to a full-scale military conflict, Trump responded: "I don't know."

headlines.title: Meet SK Hynix, the trillion-dollar South Korean chipmaker debuting on U.S. markets
headlines.summary: Following a more than sevenfold rally in its stock price over the past year, South Korea's SK Hynix is listing on the Nasdaq.

headlines.title: Ohio is America's Top State for Business in 2026, capping yearslong rise with first No. 1 finish
headlines.summary: Ohio tops CNBC's rankings for the first time in 2026, with the Buckeye State culminating a yearslong climb as the place to do business in America.

headlines.title: PepsiCo earnings miss estimates as U.S. consumers tighten their budgets
headlines.summary: PepsiCo reported weaker-than-expected quarterly earnings despite strong international demand.

headlines.title: What AI companies want for the millions they're spending on elections
headlines.summary: Lawmakers are working on AI legislation — and two major industry PACs are each pushing for their own version of regulation.

headlines.title: America's Top States for Business 2026: See the full rankings and where your state finished
headlines.summary: CNBC's annual study puts all 50 states to the test across 138 metrics and 10 categories of competitiveness. These are America's Top States for Business.

headlines.title: Clean power comeback? Don't count out renewable energy and this one stock in particular
headlines.summary: Clean power is responsible for roughly 90% of all new electrical capacity being added to the grid, according to the CEO of the American Clean Power Association.

headlines.title: Michael Burry bets on sportsbooks DraftKings and Flutter, sees prediction markets curbed by regulation
headlines.summary: The investor believes regulators will eventually crack down on prediction markets after competition from the upstarts pressured the stocks of sportsbooks.

headlines.title: Iran conflict flare-up awakens bears in airline stocks, but there's one big catch
headlines.summary: The U.S. Global Jets ETF is down 4% Wednesday, extending a two-day decline after challenging all-time highs last week.

headlines.title: Rivian tailspin hasn't shaken one trader's resolve
headlines.summary: Mike Khouw revisits his Rivian trade after the stock tanks on a share offering.

headlines.title: Kalshi traders see slim odds U.S. government will take a stake in OpenAI this year
headlines.summary: Traders on the prediction markets platform see a less than 30% likelihood the federal government will take a stake in AI companies Anthropic and OpenAI.

headlines.title: Buy these quality, low-stress stocks for the summer, says Jefferies
headlines.summary: This summer, Jefferies recommends focusing on some high-quality stocks that have been left behind by the AI momentum trade.

headlines.title: Schwab strategists warn of a major market shift: The era of easy index gains is officially over
headlines.summary: More geopolitical instability, more frequent supply shocks and macro volatility are facing investors in an era that’s just starting, says Charles Schwab.

headlines.title: The U.S. and China are today’s leaders in AI. These countries could be the next-stage champions.
headlines.summary: Economists at Bank of America spotlight South Korea and the United Arab Emirates as likely to gain from both the build-out and adoption of artificial intelligence.

headlines.title: Salesforce’s stock may look like a bargain — but that’s just a mirage, analyst says
headlines.summary: KeyBanc downgraded Salesforce shares, citing doubts about the company’s AI narrative.

headlines.title: Major drugmaker loses $27 billion in market value after failed trial
headlines.summary: Two companies announced on Thursday that the heart-disease drug they had been developing failed its Phase 3 trial.

headlines.title: Gen Z-ers share how they’re achieving financial freedom — and the old ideas they’re leaving behind
headlines.summary: A stable job and a nice home have become less accessible to young Americans. Many are taking new paths to pursue their dreams.

headlines.title: PepsiCo cuts prices on snacks. It’s not enough to drive growth in North America.
headlines.summary: PepsiCo’s stock was set to fall as the company’s North America business lagged, but strength in international business led to an earnings beat.
